revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:葵祭, en:Aoi Matsuri); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:33, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/78010776 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:33, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{仮リンク案内}} '''本文ページ'''を更新いたしました。--[[特別:投稿記録/106.184.36.190|106.184.36.190]] 2020年6月14日 (日) 10:44 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1198844194 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:33, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high|culture=y|shinto=y|royalty=y}} {{WikiProject Festivals}} }} ==Wiki Education Foundation-supported course assignment== [[File:Sciences humaines.svg|40px]] This article was the subject of a Wiki Education Foundation-supported course assignment, between 20 August 2019 and 15 December 2019. Further details are available [[Wikipedia:Wiki_Ed/University_of_Utah/Japanese_Empire_to_Korean_Wave:_Pop_Culture_in_Motion_(Fall_2019)|on the course page]]. Student editor(s): [[User:Deivira|Deivira]]. Peer reviewers: [[User:BeeHiatt|BeeHiatt]], [[User:Frankiecc|Frankiecc]]. {{small|Above undated message substituted from [[Template:Dashboard.wikiedu.org assignment]] by [[User:PrimeBOT|PrimeBOT]] ([[User talk:PrimeBOT|talk]]) 14:31, 16 January 2022 (UTC)}} :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:33, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified {{plural:1|one external link|1 external links}} on [[Aoi Matsuri]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=744592060 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20090417063352/http://www.kyoto-np.co.jp:80/kp/koto/aoi/arekore/kigen.html to http://kyoto-np.co.jp/kp/koto/aoi/arekore/kigen.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, please set the ''checked'' parameter below to '''true''' or '''failed''' to let others know (documentation at {{tlx|Sourcecheck}}). {{sourcecheck|checked=false}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 07:06, 16 October 2016 (UTC) Aoi is not a hollyhock. It is a species of asarum in English 'asarabacca' or 'wild ginger' — Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[Special:Contributions/2A00:801:210:560B:E431:B049:EE37:B830|2A00:801:210:560B:E431:B049:EE37:B830]] ([[User talk:2A00:801:210:560B:E431:B049:EE37:B830#top|talk]]) 09:57, 9 July 2019 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:33, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=744592060 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. Further details are available [[Wikipedia:Wiki_Ed/University_of_Utah/Japanese_Empire_to_Korean_Wave:_Pop_Culture_in_Motion_(Fall_2019)|on the course page]]. It is a species of asarum in English 'asarabacca' or 'wild ginger' — Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[Special:Contributions/2A00:801:210:560B:E431:B049:EE37:B830|2A00:801:210:560B:E431:B049:EE37:B830]] ([[User talk:2A00:801:210:560B:E431:B049:EE37:B830#top|talk]]) 09:57, 9 July 2019 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:50, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:en>Logoshimpo]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Aoi_Matsuri here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
